claims.summary: The live semantic lane is 48D with narrative dimensions 40-43 and reserved dimensions 44-47.
claims.disposition: Verified the current constants, lane ownership, and reserved-dimension tests.

claims.summary: Entropy-only vibrancy could become generic thickening when density geometry differs.
claims.disposition: Verified the existing gradient-aware vibrancy function and steep-gradient dampening tests; this narrows mechanics without asserting felt adequacy.

claims.summary: High-entropy loops and high-entropy narrative complexity may land differently.
claims.disposition: Route a capture-first Concordance comparison with the same entropy band and distinct representation/context signatures.

claims.summary: Reserved dimensions 44-47 may be ghost space.
claims.disposition: Verified current tests preserve dimensions 44-47 unchanged and label them default-off candidates rather than live semantic owners.

claims.summary: Changing vibrancy weighting or its live density response would alter codec delivery.
claims.disposition: Preserve an exact Tier 5 operator approval wait for any live coefficient, clamp, gain, or reserved-dimension write.
